title: Bronco Prime

description.canonical: Infused with rare Orokin alloys, the Bronco Prime is a highly efficient weapon, trading an increased Magazine Capacity and damage for a lower rate of fire.
description.display: （英文：BRONCO PRIME）加入罕见的奥罗金合金，野马 Prime 是一把高效能武器，以射速为代价，提高装弹量和伤害力。

summary: （英文：BRONCO PRIME）加入罕见的奥罗金合金，野马 Prime 是一把高效能武器，以射速为代价，提高装弹量和伤害力。
